qa_pairs.question: Who automatically gains access to a Principal Investigator's (PI's) Default RAP, and how does this differ for RAC RAPs with HPC versus Cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: For a PI's Default RAP, all of their activated sponsored user roles are always members. For RAC RAPs created with HPC resources (e.g., CPU, GPU, project storage), CCDB automatically adds all of the PI's sponsored user roles, all associated Co-PI roles, and all sponsored user roles of the associated Co-PIs as members. Any new role the PI sponsors after the RAP's creation will also be automatically added. If the RAC RAP has Cloud resources, only the PI is added as a member at the time of its creation.

qa_pairs.question: What are the three different permission levels for managing membership in a RAC RAP, and what specific actions can users at each level perform?
qa_pairs.answer: There are three RAP membership permission levels: Owner, Manager, and Member. The PI is the sole Owner and can add or remove RAP managers and members. A Manager, delegated by an Owner or another Manager, has elevated permission (on CCDB only) to make membership changes and can use the PI's allocation in the corresponding cluster(s), but cannot make changes on the project/nearline file systems on behalf of the PIs. A Member can use the PI’s allocation in the corresponding cluster(s) but cannot make any modifications to the RAP membership.

qa_pairs.question: If an Alliance account holder's position or sponsor changes, or if they have lost their password, what steps should they take instead of creating a new Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Each person is allowed only one Alliance account (one CCI). If your position or sponsor has changed, you should apply for a new role (which will have a new CCRI) instead, by logging into your existing account and visiting the 'apply for a new role' form. If you have forgotten your password, you may reset it. If you can no longer access the email address on file, you should email accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance.
